programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) endures a family tragedy and is overcome with guilt. Guest star Polly Holliday.

programme.desc: Jim's behavior at a Bears game is a bad influence on the children, but Cheryl sets a bad example too.

programme.desc: Jim advises Dana not to be herself when she's picked for the TV reality series, "The Bachelor."

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Astrophysicist Janna Levin explores black hole science.

programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Exploring Niagara Falls, its three separate waterfalls, and the mammals, birds and reptiles that surround it.

programme.title: The American Southwest
programme.desc: From the snow-clad Rockies to the scorching Mojave Desert, the Colorado River nourishes wildlife and sculpts the landscapes of the American Southwest.

programme.title: Independent Lens
programme.sub-title: True North: Canadian Myths and Black Power
programme.desc: Revisiting 1968 Montreal, where Black liberation movements converged at the Congress of Black Writers.

programme.title: 8 Days: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: A look inside the Apollo 11 spacecraft on its historic journey includes classified mission audio of conversations between astronauts Neil Armstrong, Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: How crayons are made; Lady Elaine decides she will win King Friday's contest.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and friends support Mrs. MacGrady after she is diagnosed with cancer; Elwood City wrestling champion Uncle Sam shows Francine and the community how to support cancer survivors.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: The team identifies raptors and returns them to the wild.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters head to a nearby mountain to learn about snow.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Miss Emmaline's Magic Trunk; Luke's Puppy
programme.desc: Lyla figures out how to do a magic trick with clues from Miss Emmaline; Luke finds a puppy.
